mapper.sql: select a.account_id, a.family_id, f.family_name, a.member_id, m.member_name, a.account_name, a.account_type, a.broker_name, a.cash_balance, a.account_sort, a.status, a.del_flag, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, a.remark from fin_holding_account a left join fin_family f on f.family_id = a.family_id left join fin_member_account m on m.member_id = a.member_id
mapper.insert: insert into fin_holding_account( family_id, member_id, account_name, account_type, broker_name, cash_balance, account_sort, status, remark, create_by, create_time ) values ( #{familyId}, #{memberId}, #{accountName}, #{accountType}, #{brokerName}, #{cashBalance}, #{accountSort}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, sysdate() )
